description: Use this API to list load models connected to subsystem loads along with their storage locations in the dynamics data arrays. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = ldlist(sid, all, status)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Valid subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: An array of two elements specifying a two-element array. (input).

all.description: process only buses in subsystem SID.

status.description: model connection report option (0 by default).

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
